zh: 人工智慧，指模擬人類智能的技術。
en: Artificial intelligence can generate essays quickly.
en_example: Artificial intelligence can generate essays quickly.
zh_example: Artificial intelligence can generate essays quickly.
ja: 人工知能、人間の知能を模倣する技術。
ja_example: Artificial intelligence can generate essays quickly.

zh: 由OpenAI開發的大型語言模型，用於生成自然語言文本。
en: Chat GPT is a large language model developed by OpenAI.
en_example: Chat GPT is a large language model developed by OpenAI.
zh_example: Chat GPT is a large language model developed by OpenAI.
ja: OpenAIによって開発された大規模言語モデルで、自然言語テキストを生成する。
ja_example: Chat GPT is a large language model developed by OpenAI.

zh: 大型語言模型，透過大量文本資料學習並生成語言內容的人工智慧模型。
en: Chat GPT is a large language model that learns from vast amounts of text data.
en_example: Chat GPT is a large language model that learns from vast amounts of text data.
zh_example: Chat GPT is a large language model that learns from vast amounts of text data.
ja: 大量のテキストデータから学習し、言語コンテンツを生成する人工知能モデル。
ja_example: Chat GPT is a large language model that learns from vast amounts of text data.

zh: 神經通路，指神經系統中信息傳遞的路徑。
en: The AI uses neural pathways to process and generate responses.
en_example: The AI uses neural pathways to process and generate responses.
zh_example: The AI uses neural pathways to process and generate responses.
ja: 神経経路、神経系で情報が伝達される経路。
ja_example: The AI uses neural pathways to process and generate responses.

zh: 存在危機，對自身存在意義或價值的深刻懷疑或困惑。
en: Teachers experienced an existential crisis when AI wrote essays instantly.
en_example: Teachers experienced an existential crisis when AI wrote essays instantly.
zh_example: Teachers experienced an existential crisis when AI wrote essays instantly.
ja: 実存的危機、自身の存在意義や価値に対する深い疑念や混乱。
ja_example: Teachers experienced an existential crisis when AI wrote essays instantly.

zh: 激增，迅速擴散或增加。
en: The proliferation of the internet changed education worldwide.
en_example: The proliferation of the internet changed education worldwide.
zh_example: The proliferation of the internet changed education worldwide.
ja: 急増、急速な拡散や増加。
ja_example: The proliferation of the internet changed education worldwide.

zh: 整合，將不同部分結合成一體。
en: Many apps integrate AI technology into their platforms.
en_example: Many apps integrate AI technology into their platforms.
zh_example: Many apps integrate AI technology into their platforms.
ja: 統合、異なる部分を一つにまとめること。
ja_example: Many apps integrate AI technology into their platforms.

zh: 嚴格地，嚴謹地。
en: Students need to write rigorously structured essays.
en_example: Students need to write rigorously structured essays.
zh_example: Students need to write rigorously structured essays.
ja: 厳格に、厳密に。
ja_example: Students need to write rigorously structured essays.

zh: 被批准的，官方認可的。
en: The school blocked AI applications on all sanctioned devices.
en_example: The school blocked AI applications on all sanctioned devices.
zh_example: The school blocked AI applications on all sanctioned devices.
ja: 承認された、公認の。
ja_example: The school blocked AI applications on all sanctioned devices.

zh: 反向心理學，透過反向指令誘導對方行為。
en: Teenagers often respond to reverse psychology by doing the opposite.
en_example: Teenagers often respond to reverse psychology by doing the opposite.
zh_example: Teenagers often respond to reverse psychology by doing the opposite.
ja: 逆心理学、逆の指示で相手の行動を誘導すること。
ja_example: Teenagers often respond to reverse psychology by doing the opposite.

zh: 合作，共同工作。
en: Collaboration in the classroom encourages teamwork.
en_example: Collaboration in the classroom encourages teamwork.
zh_example: Collaboration in the classroom encourages teamwork.
ja: 協力、共同作業。
ja_example: Collaboration in the classroom encourages teamwork.

zh: 專題式學習，透過實際專案進行學習。
en: Project-based learning helps students apply knowledge practically.
en_example: Project-based learning helps students apply knowledge practically.
zh_example: Project-based learning helps students apply knowledge practically.
ja: プロジェクトベース学習、実際のプロジェクトを通じて学ぶ学習法。
ja_example: Project-based learning helps students apply knowledge practically.

zh: 學生主導學習，學生自主決定學習內容與方式。
en: Student-directive learning allows learners to guide their own education.
en_example: Student-directive learning allows learners to guide their own education.
zh_example: Student-directive learning allows learners to guide their own education.
ja: 学生主導の学習、学生が自分の学習内容や方法を決定する学習法。
ja_example: Student-directive learning allows learners to guide their own education.

zh: 傾聽者，提供反饋的人或物。
en: AI can be a sounding board for students' ideas.
en_example: AI can be a sounding board for students' ideas.
zh_example: AI can be a sounding board for students' ideas.
ja: 意見の受け手、フィードバックを提供する相手。
ja_example: AI can be a sounding board for students' ideas.

zh: 替代現實，與真實世界不同的假想情境。
en: Students used AI to write alternative realities to history.
en_example: Students used AI to write alternative realities to history.
zh_example: Students used AI to write alternative realities to history.
ja: 代替現実、現実とは異なる仮想の状況。
ja_example: Students used AI to write alternative realities to history.

zh: 個別化輔導，根據個人需求設計的教學。
en: AI can provide individualized tutoring tailored to each student.
en_example: AI can provide individualized tutoring tailored to each student.
zh_example: AI can provide individualized tutoring tailored to each student.
ja: 個別指導、個人のニーズに合わせた教育。
ja_example: AI can provide individualized tutoring tailored to each student.

zh: 調整，適應。
en: Teachers need to adapt their curriculum for AI integration.
en_example: Teachers need to adapt their curriculum for AI integration.
zh_example: Teachers need to adapt their curriculum for AI integration.
ja: 適応、調整すること。
ja_example: Teachers need to adapt their curriculum for AI integration.

zh: 基本的，初步的。
en: This version of AI is rudimentary compared to future models.
en_example: This version of AI is rudimentary compared to future models.
zh_example: This version of AI is rudimentary compared to future models.
ja: 基本的な、初歩的な。
ja_example: This version of AI is rudimentary compared to future models.

zh: 不相信，懷疑。
en: There was disbelief when AI wrote a quality essay instantly.
en_example: There was disbelief when AI wrote a quality essay instantly.
zh_example: There was disbelief when AI wrote a quality essay instantly.
ja: 不信、疑い。
ja_example: There was disbelief when AI wrote a quality essay instantly.

zh: 利用，駕馭。
en: Companies harness AI to improve their services.
en_example: Companies harness AI to improve their services.
zh_example: Companies harness AI to improve their services.
ja: 活用、利用すること。
ja_example: Companies harness AI to improve their services.
